name: Beer Catfish
recipeIngredient: 4 -5 oz catfish fillets, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine 1 cup of flour, beer, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Dip the catfish strips in the remaining flour, then in the batter.
3. Fry in hot oil in a deep-fryer or skillet until golden brown. Drain on absorbent towels.
4. Serve hot with your favorite sauce.
Yield: 4 servings.
